title: Explore trending tags and filter posts

acceptance_criteria.title: Explore page shows trending tags
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I navigate to the explore page
When the page loads
Then I should see a list of trending tags

acceptance_criteria.title: Explore page shows suggested users
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I navigate to the explore page
When the page loads
Then I should see suggested users to follow

acceptance_criteria.title: Clicking a tag chip filters popular posts
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I am on the explore page
When I click a trending tag chip
Then the popular posts section should show only posts with that tag

acceptance_criteria.title: Like button exists on post cards
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I am on the home feed
When the page loads
Then I should see a like button on each post card

acceptance_criteria.title: Clicking like button toggles liked state
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I am on the home feed
When I click the like button on a post
Then the like button should reflect the liked state

acceptance_criteria.title: Load more button is visible when more posts exist
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I am on the home feed with more posts than the initial page size
When the page loads
Then I should see a load more button

acceptance_criteria.title: Clicking load more shows additional posts
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I am on the home feed showing the initial set of posts
When I click the load more button
Then I should see more posts in the feed

acceptance_criteria.title: Compose button opens the post composer
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I am on the home feed
When I click the compose button
Then I should see a post composer input area

acceptance_criteria.title: Submitting a new post adds it to the feed
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I have opened the post composer and typed a message
When I submit the post
Then the new post should appear at the top of the feed

acceptance_criteria.title: Home feed shows posts with author info
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I navigate to the home page
When the page loads
Then I should see a list of posts with author names and content

acceptance_criteria.title: Meta banner is visible on home page
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I navigate to the home page
When the page loads
Then I should see the RootSpec demo meta banner

acceptance_criteria.title: Theme toggle button is accessible in the nav
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I am on any page
When the page loads
Then I should see a theme toggle button in the navigation

acceptance_criteria.title: Clicking theme toggle switches the theme
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I am on the home page
When I click the theme toggle button
Then the page theme should change

title: See meta banner on every page

acceptance_criteria.title: Meta banner appears on the explore page
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I navigate to the explore page
When the page loads
Then I should see the meta banner

acceptance_criteria.title: Meta banner appears on the search page
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I navigate to the search page
When the page loads
Then I should see the meta banner

acceptance_criteria.title: Profile page shows user info and posts
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I navigate to a user profile page
When the page loads
Then I should see the user display name, handle, bio, and their posts

acceptance_criteria.title: Profile shows follower and following counts
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I navigate to a user profile page
When the page loads
Then I should see follower and following counts

acceptance_criteria.title: Unknown user handle shows not found state
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I navigate to a profile with a handle that does not exist
When the page loads
Then I should see a user not found message

acceptance_criteria.title: Follow button is shown on profile page
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I navigate to a user profile page
When the page loads
Then I should see a follow button

acceptance_criteria.title: Clicking follow button toggles follow state
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I am on a profile page and not following the user
When I click the follow button
Then the button should reflect that I am now following the user

acceptance_criteria.title: Search input is shown on the search page
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I navigate to the search page
When the page loads
Then I should see a search input field

acceptance_criteria.title: Typing a query shows matching posts
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I am on the search page
When I type a keyword that exists in post content
Then I should see matching posts in the results

acceptance_criteria.title: No results state shown when query has no matches
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I am on the search page
When I type a query that matches no posts
Then I should see a no results message

acceptance_criteria.title: Post detail page shows full post content
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I navigate to a post detail page
When the page loads
Then I should see the full post content and author information

acceptance_criteria.title: Post detail page shows replies when they exist
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I navigate to a post that has replies
When the page loads
Then I should see the replies listed below the post

acceptance_criteria.title: Post not found shows graceful error state
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I navigate to a post ID that does not exist
When the page loads
Then I should see a not found message rather than an error
